interpretation: White null: bare FPR 0.050 ~ alpha=0.05, KS uniformity p=0.352 (not rejected) -> engine calibrated. AR(1,0.75): bare FPR 0.180 > alpha (finite-N IAAFT anti-conservatism, openly measured), conjunction-gate FPR 0.040 <= alpha (gate restores specificity). No external TISEAN binary required.
purpose: Analytic-uniformity correctness check for the rank-order surrogate p-value; an in-repo substitute for the unavailable TISEAN byte-match that tests calibration against the Uniform(0,1) ground truth a true null implies.
